canonical_name.description: The canonical name of the concept, in English, lowercase unless a proper noun

description.description: A clear, concise one-to-two sentence definition of the concept

domain.description: Subject domain or namespace (e.g. physics, finance, linguistics)

tags.description: 2–5 lowercase, hyphenated tags for filtering and search

aliases.description: Alternative names or abbreviations for this concept

prerequisites.description: canonical_names of concepts that must be understood before this one
